user: close all my tabs except this one
content:
I can't close your other browser tabs — browser extensions (including me) don't have access to Chrome's tab management, so there's no tool available to me that can close tabs. This is a hard limitation of the extension environment, not something I can work around.

Here's how you can do it quickly yourself:

- **Close all other tabs at once:** Right-click the tab you want to keep → **"Close other tabs"** (this closes everything except the current tab in one click).
- **Close tabs to the right:** Right-click a tab → **"Close tabs to the right"** if you only want to clear the ones after a certain point.
- **Keyboard shortcut:** `Ctrl+W` (Windows/Linux) or `Cmd+W` (Mac) closes the current tab one at a time — not ideal for many tabs.

The right-click → "Close other tabs" option is the fastest way to get exactly what you want. Sorry I can't do it directly for you!
